name: Text 4
text: Small Area Estimation of poverty and welfare indicators - from setup to outputs.
textPreview: Small Area Estimation of poverty and welfare indicators - from setup to outputs.

name: Text 8
text: Prepared by Nobuo Yoshida  ·  World Bank Group
textPreview: Prepared by Nobuo Yoshida  ·  World Bank Group

name: Text 7
text: Three parts, a clear path from zero to running analyses.
textPreview: Three parts, a clear path from zero to running analyses.

name: Text 12
text: Install R and download the EU SAE Dashboard from the GitHub Releases page (currently a preliminary v2 pre-release). One-time work.
textPreview: Install R and download the EU SAE Dashboard from the GitHub Releases page (currently a preliminary v2 pre-release). One-time work.

name: Text 17
text: Load data, map variables, benchmark if needed, and run the UFH / MFH / Comparison pipeline.
textPreview: Load data, map variables, benchmark if needed, and run the UFH / MFH / Comparison pipeline.

name: Text 22
text: Sign up for a Claude or ChatGPT API key and paste it into the app.
textPreview: Sign up for a Claude or ChatGPT API key and paste it into the app.

name: Text 6
text: What is the EU SAE Dashboard?
textPreview: What is the EU SAE Dashboard?

name: Text 7
text: A single Shiny application that guides you through Small Area Estimation of poverty rates.
textPreview: A single Shiny application that guides you through Small Area Estimation of poverty rates.

name: Text 9
text: You will load survey, auxiliary, and geometry data, fit Fay–Herriot models (UFH and MFH), compare results side-by-side with maps and tables, and optionally generate AI-assisted interpretation.
textPreview: You will load survey, auxiliary, and geometry data, fit Fay–Herriot models (UFH and MFH), compare results side-by-side with maps and tabl...

name: Text 7
text: Three indicator families, all from the same survey-plus-auxiliary inputs.
textPreview: Three indicator families, all from the same survey-plus-auxiliary inputs.

name: Text 13
text: Share of the population below the poverty line — the standard poverty rate.
textPreview: Share of the population below the poverty line — the standard poverty rate.

name: Text 19
text: Depth of poverty (average shortfall) and severity (more weight on the poorest).
textPreview: Depth of poverty (average shortfall) and severity (more weight on the poorest).

name: Text 25
text: Population-weighted mean welfare, with an optional log scale and bias-corrected back-transform.
textPreview: Population-weighted mean welfare, with an optional log scale and bias-corrected back-transform.

name: Text 7
text: Select which steps to run in the sidebar of the app.
textPreview: Select which steps to run in the sidebar of the app.

name: Text 13
text: Fits one model per year, independently. A solid baseline.
textPreview: Fits one model per year, independently. A solid baseline.

name: Text 19
text: Jointly models years, borrowing strength across time.
textPreview: Jointly models years, borrowing strength across time.

name: Text 25
text: Maps, scatter plots, and precision metrics to pick a model.
textPreview: Maps, scatter plots, and precision metrics to pick a model.

name: Text 7
text: Have these ready before you click Check Data Readiness.
textPreview: Have these ready before you click Check Data Readiness.

name: Text 13
text: Household microdata with year, domain, PSU, weight, household size, welfare, poverty line, and optional strata or benchmark-level columns.
textPreview: Household microdata with year, domain, PSU, weight, household size, welfare, poverty line, and optional strata or benchmark-level columns.

name: Text 19
text: Domain-level covariates for the same areas and years used in the analysis.
textPreview: Domain-level covariates for the same areas and years used in the analysis.

name: Text 25
text: Polygon boundaries for the target domains. Domain IDs must match the survey and auxiliary files.
textPreview: Polygon boundaries for the target domains. Domain IDs must match the survey and auxiliary files.

name: Text 7
text: Set the essentials - the defaults handle the rest.
textPreview: Set the essentials - the defaults handle the rest.

name: Text 11
text: Download the package and prepare survey, auxiliary, and geometry files.
textPreview: Download the package and prepare survey, auxiliary, and geometry files.

name: Text 27
text: Choose the required settings; revisit advanced options only when diagnostics suggest it.
textPreview: Choose the required settings; revisit advanced options only when diagnostics suggest it.

name: Text 30
text: Pick analysis years and optional run label
textPreview: Pick analysis years and optional run label

name: Text 34
text: Upload survey, auxiliary, and geometry files
textPreview: Upload survey, auxiliary, and geometry files

name: Text 43
text: select whether PSUs are consistent across years
textPreview: select whether PSUs are consistent across years

name: Text 47
text: paste a Claude or ChatGPT key for diagnostics
textPreview: paste a Claude or ChatGPT key for diagnostics

name: Text 51
text: runs readiness diagnostics - no modelling yet
textPreview: runs readiness diagnostics - no modelling yet

name: Text 55
text: UFH + MFH + Comparison run; outputs are archived by run label
textPreview: UFH + MFH + Comparison run; outputs are archived by run label

name: Text 57
text: That's it.  Current outputs go to outputs/. A saved copy is archived under app_runs/<timestamp>_<run_label>/outputs.
textPreview: That's it.  Current outputs go to outputs/. A saved copy is archived under app_runs/<timestamp>_<run_label>/outputs.

name: Text 3
text: Install R and download the EU SAE Dashboard.
textPreview: Install R and download the EU SAE Dashboard.

name: Text 7
text: Two pieces of software plus the dashboard package.
textPreview: Two pieces of software plus the dashboard package.

name: Text 7
text: The statistical engine that powers everything else.
textPreview: The statistical engine that powers everything else.

name: Text 13
text: Click Download R for Windows, Mac, or Linux
textPreview: Click Download R for Windows, Mac, or Linux

name: Text 16
text: Choose “base” and run the installer with default options
textPreview: Choose “base” and run the installer with default options

name: Text 19
text: Accept all defaults — no configuration needed
textPreview: Accept all defaults — no configuration needed

name: Text 22
text: R is the statistical engine that powers the dashboard. The EU SAE Dashboard runs directly from R without needing RStudio.
textPreview: R is the statistical engine that powers the dashboard. The EU SAE Dashboard runs directly from R without needing RStudio.

name: Text 10
text: Open the GitHub repository or Releases page and download Source code (zip).
textPreview: Open the GitHub repository or Releases page and download Source code (zip).

name: Text 13
text: Windows: right-click the ZIP → Properties → check Unblock → OK, then Extract All.
textPreview: Windows: right-click the ZIP → Properties → check Unblock → OK, then Extract All.

name: Text 16
text: Choose a convenient location, e.g. Documents/EU_SAE_application_package-2
textPreview: Choose a convenient location, e.g. Documents/EU_SAE_application_package-2

name: Text 19
text: You should see Start_Dashboard.bat, app.R, R/, scripts/, sample_data/, outputs/, instructions/, and www/.
textPreview: You should see Start_Dashboard.bat, app.R, R/, scripts/, sample_data/, outputs/, instructions/, and www/.

name: Text 21
text:
EU_SAE_application_package-2/
├── app.R
├── Start_Dashboard.bat
├── install_packages.R
├── R/
├── scripts/
├── sample_data/
├── outputs/
├── instructions/
└── www/
textPreview: EU_SAE_application_package-2/ | ├── app.R | ├── Start_Dashboard.bat | ├── install_packages.R | ├── R/ | ├── scripts/ | ├── sample_data/ |...

name: Text 7
text: On first launch, Start_Dashboard.bat automatically installs all required packages.
textPreview: On first launch, Start_Dashboard.bat automatically installs all required packages.

name: Text 11
text: The script checks what is already installed and only downloads what is missing.
textPreview: The script checks what is already installed and only downloads what is missing.

name: Text 7
text: Double-click the Windows launcher or run the shell script. Your browser opens the first available local URL, usually http://127.0.0.1:7777.
textPreview: Double-click the Windows launcher or run the shell script. Your browser opens the first available local URL, usually http://127.0.0.1:7777.

name: Text 14
text: A browser window shows the cover page.
textPreview: A browser window shows the cover page.

name: Text 18
text: You land on the main workspace.
textPreview: You land on the main workspace.

name: Text 22
text: Tooltips and a help tab walk you through.
textPreview: Tooltips and a help tab walk you through.

name: Text 3
text: Load data, choose options, run the three pipeline steps.
textPreview: Load data, choose options, run the three pipeline steps.

name: Text 7
text: The first screen you see after launching the app.
textPreview: The first screen you see after launching the app.

name: Text 15
text: Small Area Estimation of poverty rates
textPreview: Small Area Estimation of poverty rates

name: Text 18
text: Click to reveal the main workspace.
textPreview: Click to reveal the main workspace.

name: Text 21
text: Sidebar — choose which steps to run
textPreview: Sidebar — choose which steps to run

name: Text 23
text: Check Data Readiness, then Run Analysis
textPreview: Check Data Readiness, then Run Analysis

name: Text 25
text: Preflight tab — input validation at a glance
textPreview: Preflight tab — input validation at a glance

name: Text 29
text: Status tab - progress, run folder, and output locations
textPreview: Status tab - progress, run folder, and output locations

name: Text 3
text: Review your data before the pipeline starts. Catch typos, missing years, and mapping issues early.
textPreview: Review your data before the pipeline starts. Catch typos, missing years, and mapping issues early.

name: Text 20
text: Loads inputs, validates variables, checks requested years and mappings, and populates the Preflight and Data Readiness tabs - no modelling yet.
textPreview: Loads inputs, validates variables, checks requested years and mappings, and populates the Preflight and Data Readiness tabs - no modellin...

name: Text 25
text: Unlocks only after step 1. Runs the selected steps, writes current files to outputs/, and saves an archived copy in app_runs/<timestamp>_<run_label>/outputs.
textPreview: Unlocks only after step 1. Runs the selected steps, writes current files to outputs/, and saves an archived copy in app_runs/<timestamp>_...

name: Text 27
text: Why two stages?  You see what the app sees before committing to a long run - catch typos, missing domains, missing household size, or unexpected years early.
textPreview: Why two stages?  You see what the app sees before committing to a long run - catch typos, missing domains, missing household size, or une...

name: Text 6
text: Preflight tab — inputs at a glance
textPreview: Preflight tab — inputs at a glance

name: Text 7
text: Shown after Check Data Readiness. Confirms the app understood your inputs.
textPreview: Shown after Check Data Readiness. Confirms the app understood your inputs.

name: Text 13
text: year, domain, psu, weight, hhsize, welfare
textPreview: year, domain, psu, weight, hhsize, welfare

name: Text 28
text: Amber  a fallback is being used
textPreview: Amber  a fallback is being used

name: Text 30
text: Red  blocking error — fix and re-run
textPreview: Red  blocking error — fix and re-run

name: Text 31
text: Preflight is cheap — re-running it is a safe way to iterate on variable mappings.
textPreview: Preflight is cheap — re-running it is a safe way to iterate on variable mappings.

name: Text 7
text: Populated when you click Check Data Readiness. Review warnings and errors before Run Analysis.
textPreview: Populated when you click Check Data Readiness. Review warnings and errors before Run Analysis.

name: Text 12
text: Both datasets include a year column.
textPreview: Both datasets include a year column.

name: Text 17
text: Survey and auxiliary data include the two requested years.
textPreview: Survey and auxiliary data include the two requested years.

name: Text 27
text: Same domains across all three files.
textPreview: Same domains across all three files.

name: Text 7
text: A few controls decide how the univariate model is fit.
textPreview: A few controls decide how the univariate model is fit.

name: Text 9
text: Rule of thumb  Start with defaults. Change them only if diagnostics suggest a problem.
textPreview: Rule of thumb  Start with defaults. Change them only if diagnostics suggest a problem.

name: Text 7
text: Multivariate models borrow strength across years; the selected MFH model drives user-facing outputs.
textPreview: Multivariate models borrow strength across years; the selected MFH model drives user-facing outputs.

name: Text 9
text: MFH2 is the default  — homoskedastic AR(1), most parsimonious and usually most reliable.
textPreview: MFH2 is the default  — homoskedastic AR(1), most parsimonious and usually most reliable.

name: Text 7
text: After modeling, benchmarking adjusts UFH and MFH estimates so benchmark groups match target rates.
textPreview: After modeling, benchmarking adjusts UFH and MFH estimates so benchmark groups match target rates.

name: Text 12
text: Check Apply benchmarking in the sidebar. If unchecked, benchmark uploads and benchmark-level mappings are ignored.
textPreview: Check Apply benchmarking in the sidebar. If unchecked, benchmark uploads and benchmark-level mappings are ignored.

name: Text 17
text: Optional targets by year and group. If omitted, targets come from survey direct estimates.
textPreview: Optional targets by year and group. If omitted, targets come from survey direct estimates.

name: Text 22
text: Leave blank for national benchmarking. Map a column such as region, NUTS2, or voivodeship for grouped benchmarking.
textPreview: Leave blank for national benchmarking. Map a column such as region, NUTS2, or voivodeship for grouped benchmarking.

name: Text 7
text: Current outputs are in outputs/. Each run also has an archived copy under app_runs/.
textPreview: Current outputs are in outputs/. Each run also has an archived copy under app_runs/.

name: Text 11
text: Consolidated HTML report - includes Section 2 Run Setup, maps, scatter plots, diagnostics, and output locations.
textPreview: Consolidated HTML report - includes Section 2 Run Setup, maps, scatter plots, diagnostics, and output locations.

name: Text 15
text: Diagnostic and map plots (.png) — reusable in your own reports.
textPreview: Diagnostic and map plots (.png) — reusable in your own reports.

name: Text 19
text: Detailed comparison of Direct, FH, benchmarked FH, MFH, and benchmarked MFH estimates with CVs, MSEs, and RMSEs.
textPreview: Detailed comparison of Direct, FH, benchmarked FH, MFH, and benchmarked MFH estimates with CVs, MSEs, and RMSEs.

name: Text 23
text: Estimate workbooks, fitted model objects, and run_metadata.rds.
textPreview: Estimate workbooks, fitted model objects, and run_metadata.rds.

name: Text 27
text: CSV summaries - Shapiro tests, significance results, readiness checks, and diagnostics.
textPreview: CSV summaries - Shapiro tests, significance results, readiness checks, and diagnostics.

name: Text 31
text: Saved run configuration - years, mappings, benchmarking settings, and output archive location.
textPreview: Saved run configuration - years, mappings, benchmarking settings, and output archive location.

name: Text 33
text: Note  Section 2 Run Setup is the audit trail: run ID/label, output folders, benchmark source/level/target, and selected MFH model.
textPreview: Note  Section 2 Run Setup is the audit trail: run ID/label, output folders, benchmark source/level/target, and selected MFH model.

name: Text 3
text: Get API keys, paste them in, and let the app interpret your diagnostics.
textPreview: Get API keys, paste them in, and let the app interpret your diagnostics.

name: Text 7
text: Plain-language interpretation of your results, in your language.
textPreview: Plain-language interpretation of your results, in your language.

name: Text 15
text: Reads Shapiro–Wilk results; can view Q–Q plots.
textPreview: Reads Shapiro–Wilk results; can view Q–Q plots.

name: Text 21
text: Privacy  Only aggregate diagnostics are sent to the API. Raw microdata and uploaded files stay on your computer.
textPreview: Privacy  Only aggregate diagnostics are sent to the API. Raw microdata and uploaded files stay on your computer.

name: Text 7
text: Anthropic's API platform — keys start with sk-ant-
textPreview: Anthropic's API platform — keys start with sk-ant-

name: Text 10
text: Open console.anthropic.com — sign up or log in.
textPreview: Open console.anthropic.com — sign up or log in.

name: Text 13
text: Settings → API Keys — or go to console.anthropic.com/settings/keys directly.
textPreview: Settings → API Keys — or go to console.anthropic.com/settings/keys directly.

name: Text 16
text: Create a new key — give it a name and copy it.
textPreview: Create a new key — give it a name and copy it.

name: Text 19
text: Add credit in Billing — pay-as-you-go, no subscription.
textPreview: Add credit in Billing — pay-as-you-go, no subscription.

name: Text 22
text: Paste into the app — AI Assistant panel → API Key field.
textPreview: Paste into the app — AI Assistant panel → API Key field.

name: Text 7
text: OpenAI's developer platform — keys start with sk-
textPreview: OpenAI's developer platform — keys start with sk-

name: Text 10
text: Open platform.openai.com — sign up or log in.
textPreview: Open platform.openai.com — sign up or log in.

name: Text 13
text: Dashboard → API Keys — or go to platform.openai.com/api-keys directly.
textPreview: Dashboard → API Keys — or go to platform.openai.com/api-keys directly.

name: Text 16
text: Create a new key — give it a name and copy it.
textPreview: Create a new key — give it a name and copy it.

name: Text 19
text: Add credit in Billing — pay-as-you-go, no subscription.
textPreview: Add credit in Billing — pay-as-you-go, no subscription.

name: Text 22
text: Paste into the app — AI Assistant panel → API Key field.
textPreview: Paste into the app — AI Assistant panel → API Key field.

name: Text 6
text: Enable the AI Assistant in the app
textPreview: Enable the AI Assistant in the app

name: Text 7
text: One checkbox, one key, one language — then you're ready.
textPreview: One checkbox, one key, one language — then you're ready.

name: Text 10
text: Uses Claude or ChatGPT to interpret diagnostics and generate briefs. Only aggregate summary statistics are sent — never raw microdata.
textPreview: Uses Claude or ChatGPT to interpret diagnostics and generate briefs. Only aggregate summary statistics are sent — never raw microdata.

name: Text 26
text: Reveals the API Key and Language fields.
textPreview: Reveals the API Key and Language fields.

name: Text 32
text: The app auto-detects Claude (sk-ant-…) or ChatGPT (sk-…).
textPreview: The app auto-detects Claude (sk-ant-…) or ChatGPT (sk-…).

name: Text 38
text: 25 options. Every AI response comes back in that language.
textPreview: 25 options. Every AI response comes back in that language.

name: Text 39
text: The key is never stored on disk — re-enter it each time you relaunch the app.
textPreview: The key is never stored on disk — re-enter it each time you relaunch the app.

name: Text 7
text: Every AI response is returned in the language you pick.
textPreview: Every AI response is returned in the language you pick.

name: Text 7
text: Quick fixes for the most common stumbling blocks.
textPreview: Quick fixes for the most common stumbling blocks.

name: Text 11
text: Re-run Start_Dashboard.bat. It reinstalls missing packages automatically.
textPreview: Re-run Start_Dashboard.bat. It reinstalls missing packages automatically.

name: Text 14
text: File not found or missing default sample files
textPreview: File not found or missing default sample files

name: Text 15
text: Make sure you extracted the full folder; if default files are missing, upload your own survey, auxiliary, and geometry files.
textPreview: Make sure you extracted the full folder; if default files are missing, upload your own survey, auxiliary, and geometry files.

name: Text 19
text: Re-run Start_Dashboard.bat; check the Status tab and app_runs/<run_label>/run.log.
textPreview: Re-run Start_Dashboard.bat; check the Status tab and app_runs/<run_label>/run.log.

name: Text 23
text: Paste only the key — no quotes, no spaces. Check billing is active.
textPreview: Paste only the key — no quotes, no spaces. Check billing is active.

name: Text 27
text: Try again; reduce year range or disable vision mode.
textPreview: Try again; reduce year range or disable vision mode.

name: Text 31
text: Check geometry domain IDs match your data and the mapped shapefile domain column.
textPreview: Check geometry domain IDs match your data and the mapped shapefile domain column.

name: Text 17
text: Paste key in the AI panel
textPreview: Paste key in the AI panel
